title: goodenia effusa
intro: Goodenia effusa, also known as the sticky goodenia, is a native Australian plant species belonging to the Goodenia genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goodenia effusa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Goodenia effusa can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its benefits and potential applications.
